overall.description: First-person walking perspective along the dirt shoulder of a rural highway in GTA V. The camera moves steadily forward past desert vegetation and power lines while various vehicles including trucks, cars, and motorcycles pass by on the road. The scene features a large billboard structure that the camera approaches and passes under near the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural highway shoulder with power lines and desert vegetation

events.description: camera moves past the large rusted utility pole at the starting position
motorcycle speeds past on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of the highway, moving away from the starting position near a large utility pole

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck driving past on the highway
motorcycle speeding past on the highway

entered.detail: tall rusted metal utility pole with equipment at the base
large highway billboard structure visible in the distance between transmission towers
tall metal lattice towers with multiple high-voltage power lines
metal highway guardrail separating the dirt shoulder from the asphalt
agave plants and dry desert vegetation on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view standing next to a large rusted utility pole on a rural highway shoulder. The camera walks forward along the dirt path as various vehicles including semi-trucks and a motorcycle pass by on the highway to the right. In the distance, transmission towers and a large billboard structure are visible against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky highway shoulder approaching billboard structure

events.description: car carrier truck transporting multiple vehicles passes by on the highway
ground surface becomes noticeably rockier with scattered stones on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the shoulder, approaching the large billboard structure in the distance

notable_agents.action: car carrier truck transporting multiple vehicles on the highway
box truck with advertising livery driving past

entered.detail: small road sign on a metal pole beside the dirt path
scattered rocks and stony ground on the shoulder

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward along the highway shoulder as the terrain becomes rockier. The billboard structure grows larger in the center of the frame while the transmission towers shift to the left. Various commercial trucks including a car carrier pass by on the highway. The large utility pole from the start disappears behind the camera.

events.description: camera passes directly underneath the large billboard structure
red sports car accelerates past at high speed

agents.ego_description: walking under and past the billboard structure, continuing along the highway shoulder with steady forward motion

notable_agents.action: red sports car accelerating at high speed on the highway
semi-truck with trailer passing under the billboard

entered.detail: large metal support legs and framework of the billboard structure

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes directly underneath the massive billboard structure, temporarily obscuring the sky. The support towers of the billboard dominate the right side of the frame as various vehicles including a red sports car and semi-trucks continue to pass by on the highway. The transmission towers remain visible in the distance to the left as the journey continues along the rural highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rural highway shoulder that progresses from an open desert landscape toward the imposing shadow of a massive billboard. It begins beside a rusted utility pole, moving forward along a dirt path as semi-trucks and a motorcycle speed past on the adjacent road under a clear blue sky. As the camera advances, the terrain becomes rockier and the distant billboard structure grows larger in the center of the frame while transmission towers shift toward the left. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and passes directly underneath the billboard, which temporarily obscures the sky and dominates the view with its heavy support towers. Finally, the perspective continues along the highway, passing a red sports car and more trucks while the transmission towers remain visible in the distance.
